scripts.deps:policy: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const bad=[];for(const s of ['dependencies','devDependencies','optionalDependencies']){for(const [n,v] of Object.entries(p[s]||{})){if(v==='latest'||v==='*')bad.push(s+':'+n+'@'+v)}} if(bad.length){console.error('Blocked dependency specs\n'+bad.join('\n'));process.exit(1)} console.log('deps policy ok')"
scripts.deps:policy:lockfile: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=fs.existsSync('pnpm-lock.yaml')?'pnpm-lock.yaml':(fs.existsSync('package-lock.json')?'package-lock.json':null); if(!f){console.log('no lockfile found');process.exit(0)} const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); const hosts=new Set(); if(f==='package-lock.json'){ for(const m of t.matchAll(/\"(?:resolved|tarball)\"\s*:\s*\"https?:\\/\\/([^\\/\"\\s]+)/g)){ hosts.add(m[1]); } } else { for(const m of t.matchAll(/(?:resolved|tarball):\s*https?:\/\/([^\/\s]+)/g)){ hosts.add(m[1]); } } const bad=[...hosts].filter(h=>h!=='registry.npmjs.org'); if(bad.length){console.error('Disallowed lockfile hosts:\n'+bad.join('\n'));process.exit(1)} console.log('lockfile host policy ok')"
